chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Acq. Appeal No.456 of 2024 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025 Appellant present in person. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Addl. P.G, Sindh. ******* Appellant is present in person argued that the impugned judgment has been passed in a haphazard manner without allowing six eye witnesses to be examined. Moreover, Investigation Officer was also not examined nor MLO, Lady MLO, nor private witnesses were examined. CDR was also not allowed to be exhibited. She further pleads that earlier application under Section 265-K Cr.P.C Annexure-E (available at page 139 of the court file) was also rejected vide order dated 06.04.2021, whereas at present, no application under Section 265-K Cr.P.C was filed by any accused persons but the Court out of its own motion and as suo-moto action, illegally acquitted the accused persons under Section 265-K Cr.P.C Points raised by Appellant prima-facie raises serious question of law and fact and that the order was passed without application of law and judicial mind in a slip-shod manner. Appeal is therefore admitted. Call R&P, prepare paper book and issue notice to the Respondents, for 19.07.2025. JUDGE Hyder/PS*
